caption: In an office setting, three people are gathered in a room featuring a framed picture and a black monitor. A man in a dark grey suit with a white shirt and a red patterned tie stands centrally, looking down and then shifting his gaze toward others. To his left, another man wearing a white dress shirt and a purple tie looks upward toward him. To the right, a blonde woman in a brown turtleneck looks forward with a neutral expression. As the scene progresses, the man in the suit speaks, shifting his expression from a frown to a wide-eyed, open-mouthed look of surprise or intensity. Simultaneously, the man in the white shirt reaches up to touch his face with his hand. Small yellow labels with black text are visible on the equipment behind them, though the text is illegible.
